title: V2 Podman diff(changes) support
body:
* ported CLI commands
* Added APIv2 support
* Added golang bindings
* Added registry.IdOrLatestArgs to be used in support of
  cobra.Command{Args:}
* Added swagger (Attempted to document all calls to one endpoint)

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>
